allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Node ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node -v 2>$null; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; npm -v 2>$null; Write-Output "=== git ==="; git --version 2>$null; Write-Output "=== Folder contents ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== Is git repo? ==="; if \(Test-Path .git\) { "yes" } else { "no" })
PowerShell($gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($gh\) { "gh installed: $gh"; gh --version } else { "gh CLI: NOT installed" })
PowerShell($c = \(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($c\) { "claude CLI: $c"; claude --version } else { "claude CLI: NOT on PATH" })
PowerShell(claude mcp add --scope project --transport http supabase "https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp?project_ref=lqfqkivbxeexmrxuxefi")
